# GC Talent Release Notes Format

Use this template when creating a new GitHub release. Copy the structure below and fill in the entries.

**Rules:**
- No bold (`**...**`) on PR titles — plain text only
- Author format: `[@username](https://github.com/username)`
- PR link format: `[#NNNNN](https://github.com/GCTC-NTGC/gc-digital-talent/pull/NNNNN)`
- Use `###` subheaders under `## What's Changed`
- Remove empty sections
- Remove duplicate entries

---

## What's Changed

### 🚀 Features and Enhancements
- PR title by [@username](https://github.com/username) in [#NNNNN](https://github.com/GCTC-NTGC/gc-digital-talent/pull/NNNNN)

### 🐛 Bug Fixes
- PR title by [@username](https://github.com/username) in [#NNNNN](https://github.com/GCTC-NTGC/gc-digital-talent/pull/NNNNN)

### 🧹 Refactors & Code Quality
- PR title by [@username](https://github.com/username) in [#NNNNN](https://github.com/GCTC-NTGC/gc-digital-talent/pull/NNNNN)

### 🧪 Testing
- PR title by [@username](https://github.com/username) in [#NNNNN](https://github.com/GCTC-NTGC/gc-digital-talent/pull/NNNNN)

### 📝 Copy & Content
- PR title by [@username](https://github.com/username) in [#NNNNN](https://github.com/GCTC-NTGC/gc-digital-talent/pull/NNNNN)

### 🔨 Technical Debt
- PR title by [@username](https://github.com/username) in [#NNNNN](https://github.com/GCTC-NTGC/gc-digital-talent/pull/NNNNN)

### ⬆️ Dependency Updates
- Bump package from X.X.X to Y.Y.Y by [@dependabot](https://github.com/apps/dependabot) in [#NNNNN](https://github.com/GCTC-NTGC/gc-digital-talent/pull/NNNNN)

### 🏗️ Other
- PR title by [@username](https://github.com/username) in [#NNNNN](https://github.com/GCTC-NTGC/gc-digital-talent/pull/NNNNN)

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/GCTC-NTGC/gc-digital-talent/compare/vX.XX.X...vX.XX.X
